summary: Joel Spolsky announces that Fog Creek Software is expanding its summer internship program. The company is doubling the program from two to four interns and broadening it to include both software development and software marketing roles. The post targets CS students and MBA students respectively, with a February 1st application deadline.
key_points: Fog Creek Software is doubling its internship program from two to four positions
The program now spans two tracks: Software Development (for CS students) and Software Marketing (for MBA students)
The expansion signals Fog Creek's growing investment in talent pipeline and marketing capability
money_quotes: Once again my company Fog Creek Software is looking for A Few Good College Students to work as interns next summer.
key_insight: Fog Creek Software was deliberately expanding its internship program to build both engineering and marketing talent pipelines.
